executive_summary: Pipeline health is critical: all three leads ($615K total) are at risk due to extended inactivity (33–47 days without engagement) despite active sales effort or imminent close dates. Two deals are overdue or within 4 days of deadline (Acme Corp and GlobeTech), while the largest opportunity (DataHarbor, $310K) remains unowned and stalled in early qualification. Immediate leadership intervention is required across all three accounts to either salvage negotiation momentum, confirm close readiness, or deploy ownership and acceleration resources within the next 48 hours.
review_notes: • DataHarbor ($310K, Unassigned) represents 50% of pipeline value with zero owner accountability and minimal touches (2)—assign a senior AE immediately to prevent further drift. • Acme Corp deal is 5 days overdue with 47 days of silence; prepare win-back or discount strategy to recover or formally close-lost. • All three leads show >30 days idle despite varying stages, indicating systemic engagement breakdown—consider pipeline health KPI audit.
